query:
SELECT 
  id,
  section,
  entity,
  status,
  current_stage,
  progress,
  resume_page,
  error_message,
  started_at,
  finished_at,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, started_at, IFNULL(finished_at, NOW())) AS duration_min
FROM sync_logs
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 20;
